headline: 3 Reasons to Sell GDDY and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Shareholders of GoDaddy would probably like to forget the past six months even happened. The stock dropped 37.4% and now trades at $79.51. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: A Look Back at E-commerce Software Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) and the rest of the e-commerce software stocks fared in Q1.
